feat.name: Divine Aegis
feat.text: A barrier offers protection against other magic but leaves you exposed to divine energy. Until the beginning of your next turn, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against nondivine magical effects, but you also take a –1 circumstance penalty to saves against divine effects.

traits.name: Divine
traits.text:
This magic comes from the divine tradition, drawing power from deities or similar sources. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to divine magic.

traits.name: Oracle
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the oracle class.

feat.trigger: You attempt a saving throw against a magical effect, but you haven’t rolled yet.
